entry.title: Database Vendor Code: 1427 Error code:-2147215357 [CRSDK00000615] Error code name:internal
entry.content:
Hello, I am use SAP crystal report service to generate report.

When I try to generate report, I get below error at backend:

2024-07-23 03:30:41.060,Failed to retrieve data from the database.,

2024-07-23 03:30:41.060,Details: [Database Vendor Code: 1427 ]---- Error code:-2147215357 [CRSDK00000615] Error code name:internal,

2024-07-23 03:30:34.288,Failed to retrieve data from the database.,

2024-07-23 03:30:34.288,Details: [Database Vendor Code: 1427 ],

The user local get below error:

User can download SAP successfully in PROD environment, but can't in UAT environment.

Compared the UAT and PROD, all are same, don't know why have this issue in UAT.

Kindly help.

entry.title: Re: Edge Integration Cell : Design, deploy and manage APIs
entry.content:
Hi  Ashutosh,

Thanks for the detail post.  I followed your blog and was able to create the same API and test it; however, if I try to connect to an internal resource (ODATA in ECC), I'm presented with an option of either "Internet" or "Manual" for Proxy Type in the ODATA connector, and when I select "Manual", I have to provide the Proxy Host and Port.  Where would I find the value for the proxy host?

Thanks,

Rich

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP SuccessFactors' API's: How to use Insomnia to automate the generation of SAML Assert

entry.title: Re: SAC - Calculated Dimension in Modeler
entry.content:
Hi corrfpa, 

   There is no calculated dimension concept yet in modeler. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with chargeable components

entry.title: How to cancel a large number of Supplier invoice in bulk？
entry.content:
I know that the supplier invoice list（F1060A ）  can be used to reverse supplier invoice(F0859) . But it can only be cancelled one at one time. What app can I use to cancel a large number of of Supplier invoice in bulk？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to cancel a large number of Supplier invoice in b...
entry.content:
There is no app to mass reverse supplier invoices. As workaround you may consider using APIs as below:

ODATA API Supplier Invoice - OData V2:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/bb9f1469daf04bd894ab2167f8132a1a/de8c37d56eb641dc82b9b8c38be00318.html?locale=en-US

SOAP API Supplier Invoice - Reverse (A2A, Inbound, Asynchronous):
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/bb9f1469daf04bd894ab2167f8132a1a/f909a2658dd643eb9097ffbdf4e4fa13.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: VS Code Configuration - Error on Created Application during Data Source and Service Selection
entry.content:
There is issue with my Visual Studio Code, during the initial creation of Save System, I’m able to do the connection testing (using same username and password)

 

 

But upon login or trying to create the application using wizard we are facing authentication error on steps Data Source and Service Selection. 

its return Authentication incorrect! error message.

We already double check the user name and password , it match exactly with backend and we can login successfully also when trying to Save System config in VS Code 

 

Thank you.

#visualstudiocode
SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: Re: Change Screen Name under Contexts
entry.content: Not any more, no. You need to go into the simulation, find the screen(s) that have that context, and then change the screen name there (Screen > Rerecord > Context). Those fields you are looking at will be re-generated automatically on save.

entry.title: Re: STO between a plant that is Automatic Batch Split Val...
entry.content: What happens if the sending plant sends multiple batches with different valuation types? Should I change the PO to different line items with different valuation types?

entry.title: Re: Sales Contracts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_order quantity restriction compared to contract quan
entry.content:
Hi Thangaraj,

In S/4HANA Cloud, the restriction that order quantity shall be less then referenced contract item is not provided, instead, the warning message is raised.

The customizing mentioned above is not exposed to cloud, therefore there's no hard check based on the customizing.

Thanks a lot and Best Regards,

Andy

entry.title: Custom Code Text Reading Issue in SAP CDS View
entry.content:
Hello Guru!

In Custom Fields and Logic, custom Code and TEXT were added as shown below.
And I posted it with a custom code in the Accounting journal entry app. I also confirmed that the corresponding code was saved in the I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA table (CDS view).


In a custom development report that reads the I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA table (CDS view)
I want to read the text corresponding to the custom code.

It cannot be read because the API State is Cannot be set.

YY1_ACTIVITYCODE_W


Please help me with how to read the text of Custom Code.

thank you

Huny

entry.title: Re: Custom Reporting using Advance Compliance Report in S4HANA Cloud

Hello @Amith_Nair ,

How do you assign reporting category? In my case, if i assign Country in reporting category when create , my reporting category doesn't appear to choose. 

Thank you very much.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：技术话题（Technology Cross Topics）
entry.content:
1. 数据迁移

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的2408版本中，Migration Cockpit新增了以下迁移对象：

  • Asset to control tax credits (Brazil)

  • Bank

  • Configurable BOM links

  • EHS - Business partner for waste transporters and disposers

  • EHS - Control

  • EHS - Job

  • EHS - Waste disposal channel

  • EHS - Waste stream

  • EHS - Waste transporter and disposer

  • EHS - Waste type and waste codes

  • In-house banking account (new)

  • In-house banking condition (new)

  • PC - Ecological information

  • PC - Toxicological information

  • PC - Use

  • QM - Quality level

  • Real estate - Usable object

  • Routing (new)

以下迁移对象被标记为“Deprecated”：

  • Bank (deprecated)

  • Business solution order (deprecated)

  • FI - Bank account balance (deprecated)

  • JVA - Joint venture master data (deprecated)

  • Routing (deprecated)

如想了解关于数据迁移在2408版本中的更多信息，请查看以下链接：

Change Overview for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 | SAP Help Portal

 

2. Belize主题弃用

在2408版本更新中，界面显示外观主题的Belize系列将被弃用。如果您正在使用这些主题，建议您更新到Horizon主题。

 

3. 锁定产品主数据特定字段不可编辑

在产品主数据应用中，新增了一个复选框可以锁定指定字段，被锁定的字段将变得不可编辑。

 

4. 更方便的查看扩展对象的更新

在之前的版本中，我们会在不同的文档链接中发布那些已更改、已删除、已弃用或新的扩展对象，比如CDS视图、API、业务对象接口等等。那样你会需要查看很多文档链接，不够方便。

现在，我们将在一个统一的链接里公布所有的扩展对象的更新，你可以使用不同的过滤器查看你感兴趣的更新。

你可以记住以下地址，该链接会始终打开最新版本的内容：

 https://help.sap.com/S4_CE_CHANGES_EXT_OBJ

 

5. 在IAM Information System里查找业务角色和预定义空间的关系

当我们在给业务角色分配空间，想知道什么预定义空间分配给了哪些角色。那么，我们可以在IAM Information System应用里查找到这些信息。

点击Business Role - Launchpad Space，我们可以快速查找相关信息。

entry.title: The used and unused object list in CCLM
entry.content:
Hi, Now we have config the CCLM in our solman system, and there is correct data in the dashboard. It shows that the number of used objects is about 9,000, the number of unused objects is about 36,000, the number of N/A is about 65,000. Now I get that the object list is stored in the table AGSCCL_OBJECT. But I can't find any attributes in this table that can distinguish usage situations.

So that is my question:

In which table is the usage details stored in the dashboard? Or what filtering criteria can I use to obtain a detailed list of custom objects used and unused in the corresponding dashboard. Thanks.

#CCM

SOLMAN Business Process Operations @Sap

Exchange Rates
Currency Code Names
Conversion Factors
Currency Codes

Every time I attempt to import these tables, the process fails. Has anyone else encountered similar issues or have any suggestions on how to successfully import this data?Thanks in advance

Priyanka

Hi @Chaitanya_Priya ,

entry.title: Re: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana...
entry.content:
Hi,

The answer is powered by Joule. The major difference between OData and S/4HANA Connection in SAP Analytics Cloud is that OData is used to import transaction data from SAP S/4HANA or S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Analytics Cloud, while S/4HANA Connection is used to establish a connection between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP S/4HANA Cloud for planning and budgeting processes. OData services are available for importing various types of data, such as journal entries, financial planning data, balance flows, cost estimates, and statistical key figures. On the other hand, S/4HANA Connection enables the integration of SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for activities like budget planning and group reporting.

In most cases, S/4HANA connections are recommended for accessing custom CDS views due to their expected performance advantages.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: I am unable to print PO form.
entry.content:
We are using ME23N t-code to print PO form but unable to print po form it is asking for password when we try to click on print option. we can be able to save the po form but when we open saved pdf it is asking for password. We tried in ME9F also we got same issue. I can see the printing is not allowed in file permissions. How to provide access to print PO form.

Is there any option to enable printing permission from Basis or ABAP side?

entry.title: Re: How to implement RAP action in Un Managed Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hi Kumar, hope you are doing fine.

I'm facing the same issue when trying to build a RAP service. Were you able to fix it or find a workaround for it?

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Re: GPS Validation in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi Mehak, Check the part 2 of this dev challenge where we were doing something similar to your requirement https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/april-citizen-developer-challenge-sap-build-apps-task-4-mobile-device/td-p/13680103 . Import this project https://github.com/sap-tutorials/sap-build-apps/blob/main/projects/challenges-2024/NearbyApp-Final.mtar and refer the logic attached to the "Check distance" button on the Details page. You can modify this logic slightly ie use the logic in the arePointsNearBy as thats your requirement, so that you can alert a message if the admin is inside/outside of the 10km radius.

entry.title: Can the system make a beep/bell sound when there is an error using SAP screen personas script?
entry.content: If we have an error shown in a screen, can we allow the system to make a beep/bell sound using SAP Screen personas scripts/flavour? Any help on this is mich appreciated.

entry.title: Re: External Learning Request Configuration / Customization - SAP SF LMS - Guide
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have hidden some of the fields in the Form, but there is lot of blank spaces as you can see it in the screenshot. I dont need those fields or section. Now the form looks really ugly. Is there any way to hide the section or decrease the blank space. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP RAP : Custom Entities with compositions relationship in a Fiori Elements App
entry.content:
Hi Ramjee! 

Thanks for your post, it was really helpful for a service I'm building right now. I have a couple of questions/issues which I've been trying to fix for a while but could not find a workaround and maybe you can help me with!

1) We have a scenario where we need to access the result of the first custom entity read in the second one. For example: when reading the items, we need to access the header obtained in the first step. But the problem is that each entity is being executed in its own session so we can't even use export to memory or global variables to store data. Is there a way to achieve it and make it work like a GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET?

2) We have the custom entities created and we associated an action to it to create a sales order using the standard API. The problem is that we need to call the action sending like a payload with all the information of the sales order to be created. Is it possible? Or we may need to go with a custom unmanaged BO ?

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Re: What has replaced sybase.subscribenet.com for PowerBu...
entry.content: Thanks to the member who posted the link to https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap. I visited the page but not finding PowerBuilder among the listed programs, I thought it didn't apply. Later I revisited the page and found the link at the top of that page, "Go to Sybase Product Download Center (SPDC) License Rehost". That opens a simple form where you import your PB125.lic file (which you need to get from the current host), enter the new Host ID and new host name. Click the Generate button and you're prompted for the save file name and location. Copy the new PB125.lic file to the new host, open PB 12.5, use Tools>Update License to bring in the new license. Restart PB and check that the license info under Help>About is now correct. Problem solved.

entry.title: Re: How to communicate the value of Enterprise Architecture in SAP projects
entry.content:
Agree with consideration and value an EA provides.  

I particularly agree with consideration #2.

The challenges are that customer are engaging an SI to assist them on the feasibility and business case for their S/4HANA implementation, bypassing their internal EA department, which is bad governance.

I have yet seen an SI partner, who provides an EA on these engagements, as they focus on SAP solution only.

Also challenging, each SI partner demonstrates their own ecosystem of frameworks and accelerators, adding more chaos!

entry.title: RAP Framework - Custom Entities GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We have an scenario where we need to migrate a SEGW service to RAP. This service retrieves values from custom tables but has several entities and a lot of custom logic behind, so we opted for custom entities.

The problem is that in the current SEGW we are using the GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET functionality and we are not being able to replicate that with Custom Entities.

When reading the different entities data we need to be able to access the previous ones. For example: we read the Header custom entity but then the system process the read of the Positions custom entity in a different session so we can't access the Header data even if we try to do it with memory or global variables.

The return of the service works fine, the EXPAND is working and we end up getting the Header and the Position entities together, but the problem is that when reading the Positions we need to do some custom logic that involves using the Header data we can't access.

Is it possible to achieve this? Or is there a workaround to handle GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET while using custom entities?

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Re: How to Master Planning strategies in SAP PP Demand Ma...
entry.content:
Hi,

For start you can refer the below help portal documentation on demand management, which includes planning strategies with sample scenarios.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/eedc1019283a438a8b73fdde490abc4f/0f23bf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html?q=production%20strategies

For additional content you can search the community too.

you should apply what you have learn in a test system, by testing various strategies and their outcome to get a clear understanding.

Regards,

Arjuna

entry.title: Re: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana...
entry.content:
first option, sac connected to odata, not your cds.

second option should be better, odata conversion takes additional time(compare with direct connection),  odata is the additional layer between sac and cds.

entry.title: Re: How to Reclaim size of volume "/hana/shared and /hana...
entry.content:
After i delete log file in /hana/shared and /hana/log. hdbindexserver can not running .

How can I solve it ?

entry.title: RAP(RestfulABAP) custom entity Projection view Problems
entry.content:
Hello

I am currently publishing an OData API that queries data through RAP Managed Query.

It was working well, but customer requirements added a business scenario in which data was added to a specific CBO table when certain privileged users READ data.

After reviewing the lifecycles of the RAP to use the feature, we conclude that MANAGED QUERY does not have any special events to deal with it.

So I'm trying to change the existing query to UNMANAGED Query to implement this, but there was a problem.

Currently, our BO is not directly bound to the service, but binding through the projection view.

Problem is I'm trying to replace Root Entities with Custom Entities, so Custom Entities do not allow projection views!!

Because projection views are not allowed, deleting entire projection structures and changing them to use custom entities directly will require a huge number of code changes and likely have negative side effects.

So.. is there another way to projection this custom entity through "AS Projection On [custom entity]" < grammar?

Or, is there a separate callback that allows me to perform my custom logic after a read event occurs to use managed queries as they are?

Best regards

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model 
@

entry.title: Re: How to Reclaim size of volume "/hana/shared and /hana...
Re: RAP Framework - Custom Entities GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET
entry.content: we also had same issue,in the io_request, actually you have all the header data, but sap just didn't give you api to get it, you have to query it again(your custom logic) to get header data.

entry.title: Which Communication Scenario can get Currency Exchange Rate data configured in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi，

I am configuring Odata API in SAP app: Communication Arrangements. I wan to get a table about Currency Exchange Rate , Which scenario include this data? Or is there a query facility for scenario?

Thanks~

entry.title: Re: ML currencies are not integrated in FI for valuation area m123. Message No. FML_CUST033
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

 

maintian controlling area

create controlling area and assign a controlling area to a company code in SAP: Path: SPRO > IMG > Controlling > General Controlling > Organization

Select New Entries or Copy CO Area Fill in the mandatory fields, including Controlling Area and CoCd>CO Area Choose from the following options for CoCd>CO Area: Controlling Area same as Company Code: Assigns only one company code to a controlling area

I have maintained currency type: 10 Assign company codes to the controlling area 

In material legder activation process

Goto T code: OMX2 and create new material legder type EX: V123 and assign the currencyvaluation type: 10 (Company code currency) and save

Goto Tcode: OMX3------Goto new entries My valuation area: VIYY, company code: VIYA, Material ldger type: 9000, now the status is in Green and ML currencies are allowed in FI and save now the issue is resolved.

we have to do T codes: OMX1 and CKMSTART for to activate material ledger as peoductive for the required valuation area

 

In my case issue is resolved, please ping back here if it helps to anyone to resolve the similar issue

entry.title: Re: How to Reclaim size of volume "/hana/shared and /hana...
entry.content:
Deleting log files may cause system issues due to their role in tracking and debugging.

Here's a solution:
1. Restart the HANA system using `HDB stop` and `HDB start`.
2. Restore the log files if you have a backup.
3. Ensure sufficient disk space in /hana/shared and /hana/log directories to allow hdbindexserver to run.
4. Verify correct permissions for the same directories.
5. Use `HDB admin_check` to check system logs for more information on hdbindexserver issues.

entry.title: Re: Revenue Recognition - Cost-Based Percentage of Comple...

task: "northbreeze-productinfo",
result: "PASS",

communityid: "cguttikonda24"
}
]

entry.title: Re: Accessing long text of SAP Master data Objects or fields in S4 Hana through a CDS View
entry.content:
@koyaajai @fischerm, I found a way for program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE to use other Text Objects. Do note however that this is not recommended by SAP and is explicitly stated in OSS note 3048704. So, only do it with that in mind.

The text objects that it can process are defined in view ESH_V_LT_CDSASOC. These entries are CDS-entities that have an association to I_TextObjectPlainLongText. To be able to process texts that are not defined by SAP there, do the following:

  1. Create a custom CDS-entity in ADT that does an association to I_TextObjectPlainLongText. You can check the association done by I_Product as reference.
  2. After creating and activating the CDS-entity, add a new entry to ESH_V_LT_CDSASOC for the CDS-entity that you created. This will ask you for a customizing Transport Request.
  3. Run program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE in Test mode using your other/custom text object to confirm that it was able to pick-up the data and process.
  4. Once the test run looks okay, proceed using the Update Run option.

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot status CRTD CHCR SPRQ
entry.content: Hi, Please check the inspection setup for inspection type 03/04 etc. If the "Manual sample calc." option is selected in the material master, then you need to perform the manual sample calculation in the inspection lot. Thank you.

entry.title: Flexible Workflow PO - How to Skip/Auto Approve
entry.content:
Hello,

In the flexible workflow for Purchase order, how can we skip/auto approve if the approver repeats more then once in workflow ?

Assume in the WF, we have 6 level approvers, in which at level 2 (Dept. Head) & level 4 (CFO) its same user,  when the User at level 2 approves, system should either Auto Approve/Skip the level 4 in the WF process.

Similary it should work in the Substituion scenario also.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Opt...
entry.content:
Hello, Yes we had the same situation.

To obtain same or better performance, we had to analyse the performance of all scripts (performance analyzer).

We didn't use the view port loading, we only use the background loading process.

Are you using scripts too or simple stories ?

entry.title: Form 16 Annexure is not displaying not displaying data correctly
entry.content:
Hi All ,

In my company , there is an employee who was working on contract . His contract expired on August 2023 and we rehired him by renewing contract in Oct 2023 .

the tcode pc00_m40_f16 is showing 2 document howver the annexure is showing wages only from month APR 2023 to Aug  2023 it not showing amount of wages from month Oct 2023  to March 2024 in either of form print out .

This scenario is common for us .the system was working fine for year 22-23 . But this time it is behaving like this .

Is there any way to generate annexure for month OCT 23- Mar 24 also .

Thanks in Advance ,

Shikha Singh Chauhan

entry.title: Re: S/4 Purchase Order Flexible Workflow: Agent Determination by BADI
entry.content:
Hello

How can i skip/auto approve if the approver repeats more then once in the workflow ? 

Eg: if there is a same approver at level 2 & level 4, if the user approves at level 2 system should auto approve the level 4 also.

entry.title: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
I have followed few developer tutorials:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-level-up.html

Following above tutorials I created many mdk apps with systems SampleServiceV4 & swagger_petstore

I googled a lot but surprisingly I did not see any blog explaining creating tile selecting 'system' for sap mobile start

this below blog has shown creating tile selecting "no system"

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-mobile-start-adding-native-apps-to-your-content/ba-p/13515218

 

Please help in this regard.

@dennis_koehler 

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Opt...
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing your experience with converting SAC stories to the optimized design. It's interesting to hear about the performance changes you've observed. There could be various reasons for the increased load times, such as differences in how data is handled or changes in visualization complexity. I'm curious to know if others have encountered similar issues and what solutions might be available.

Kind regards,

Sydney Digital Agency

entry.title: [BYD] how to find out who registered the contract and project
entry.content:
Please tell me how to find out who registered the contract and project.
Not the person responsible, but the person who registered.

Since it is possible to know the registrants of orders and purchase orders, I think it is possible to check the above two items (contracts and projects), but I could not find them by myself.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] how to find out who registered the contract and...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

According to 2665406 - How to Find the Creator of the Copy From a Contract, the identity of the person who creates a document is not stored.

Different from purchasing contract, the "created by" field isn't exposed on the UI (isn't part of the standard) as it's a technical field and not necessarily related to business data.

If client would like to know creator of a specific contract, the creation identity of the person who created a document can be found in the backend on the ROOT node of the CUSTOMER_CONTRACT BO.

 

Regards,
Carrie

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: SM20 audit log - RFC/CPIC logon failed errors
entry.content: @sravankumar319: Did you find any solution to this problem?

entry.title: BTP IRPA screens don't identify for other users
entry.content: When I share a project with other users, the screen doesn't identify.  It runs fine on my machine, and doesn't appear to have anything user specific in the title text that was used for the recognition criteria.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Optimized Design Experience
entry.content: Could you please raise this to SAP via incident? Thanks.

entry.title: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Greetings, we are interested to learn what functionality now replaces scope item 19C which is no longer available in 2402. Can SAP please recommend the Best Practice alternative approach we should adopt to achieve similar functionality?

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hi @samuelyang, I am preparing for CDC Certification and would need more of these recorded sessions, Could you please share if you have them

 

Thanks,

Ameen

entry.title: Re: Change Screen Name under Contexts
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

If you are talking about relinking individual steps in a Guided Tour to new screen, you can do this in the Element tab of the step that must be updated.  To do this:

1. Open the Guided Tour for editing
2. Open the new application screen
3. Open the individual Guided Tour step for editing and navigate to the Element screen
4. Click the Change Screen ID button

 That will modify the context on that individual step.  You will need to update the context on the other steps that also relate to the new screen.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: What is the workaround for Quote.RefreshActions in 2.0?
entry.content:
Hi,

Following the migration guidance in Develop | SAP Help Portal, Quote.RefreshActions() has also been deprecated in Quote 2.0.

May you please describe the scenario where you need to "refresh" action condition so that we can better understand how we can help?

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: how to transfer Site master with BP from S4HANA to ECC
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for a way to transfer site master along with BP from S4HANA Retail to ECC Retail. all comments are welcome. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Tax Code not Appearing in FB60
entry.content: Please maintain reporting country for missing Tax code in properties option of FTXP

entry.title: Posting date should be locked and future date should not be accepted in sap public cloud
entry.content: Does above will be possible in public cloud with validation or any other method? and If how I would get all details like which validations and customization are allowed in SAP PUBLIC CLOUD?

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content:
Hi,

You can find the latest deprecated scope items and their successors in What's New Viewer - SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal. Alternatively, you can also access this information via Process Navigator - SAP for Me.

Based on the lists of deprecated scope items for versions 2308 and 2402, I couldn't find any reference to "19C". Could you please double-check the expected scope item ID or provide the process name for further clarification?

 

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Schemes - Buy X quantity of material for free on purc...
entry.content: Hello Team, We have encountered an issue with our current free goods solution. Our client requires a more complex scenario where free goods are offered based on the combined volume of multiple products. Specifically, if products A, B, C, D, and E together reach a volume of 50 tonnes, then 10 kg of any of these products (A, B, C, D, or E) should be given for free. The existing free goods solution manages free products on a one-to-one (1:1) ratio basis, but our requirement is to aggregate the quantities of multiple products to meet the minimum order quantity and then provide a free product from any of these.

entry.title: Mass Classification of Packaged Dangerous Goods
entry.content:
In this how-to blog, we’ll guide you through the process of using the new mass classification functionality, for Dangerous Goods Management within Product Compliance, which will make your life easier. For more information about this feature, including technical information, go here. 

Use the mass functionality with Classify Selected Products in the Classify Unpackaged Dangerous Goods app, by selecting multiple packaged dangerous goods in section Related Packaged Products or Use the mass functionality with Classify Selected Products in the My Packaged Dangerous Goods app, by selecting multiple packaged dangerous goods in the worklist.

With this new feature you use mass classification when you have a product which you want to sell it in different distribution chains, but don’t want to use the same product name for all.

 

 

 

Here you have 4 versions of a 100-liter drum and a 20-liter version.

 

 

 

 

 

You have already added the compliance purposes for transport with the EU and North America.

 

 

 

 

After selecting the products, you need to fill out the first line with the correct information including Enclosure Variants and Exemption Category.

 

 

 

 

You select the line with the correct information and click on Copy.

 

 

 

 

Then you highlight the other lines to copy the information and click on Paste.

 

 

 

 

After making sure all the information is correct, in this example you must set the one product quantity to 20-liters.

 

 

 

 

Now the system will calculate dangerous goods descriptions and labeling for all the products.

 

 

 

 

 

Now you have a chance to update the Transport Permission for the compliance requirement versions in the compliance purpose.

 

 

 

 

For IATA, 100-liter drums are not allowed for transport, but the 20-liter product is allowed. You change the 4 products and set the Transport Permission to Forbidden. Finally, click on Release on the bottom.

 

 

 

Now you see that the classification for each product is set to Released.

entry.title: SAP BPA - How can I run a automation project for a long time?
entry.content:
Hello, I am currently working on an automation project that transfers web information into an Excel file.

However, after a few hours, the agent automatically disconnects, and the project exits. How can I run it for a long time without it stopping halfway?

entry.title: Re: Schemes - Buy X quantity of material for free on purc...
entry.content: In the free goods tile, only 1 Material at a time in a condition is allowed, for eg. Material X buy 10 qty and get 1 free. But if I have to add scale i.e. same Material X 20 qty and get 3 free is not allowing.

entry.title: how to settle unsettled project line items of previous closed financial year
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have an issue in SAP S/4 Hana. I found line items of a project were not settled in a prior period and financial year that is now closed (P12 FY2023).

I cannot run settlement for the current period (P7 FY2024) because the prior period P12 FY2023 is not settled. The unsettled period is already closed (Dec) and the year (2023) is closed as well. Obviously I cannot reopen  the year/period. Is there a work around to get those line items settled?

The error message I get when trying to run the settlement in the current period is;

"First Settle items from the previous year in the previous year"

Can anyone help me to advise what should I do to settle the unsettled line items of P12 FY2023?

Thank you and appreciate for your helps

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Hi Fancy, thanks for your quick reply. I am referring to Activity Management in Procurement (19C) which was last available in 2023 of SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud private edition. https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-055/2023/SolP/19C?region=AU

entry.title: Re: J2EE Instance does not start while while installing Netweaver 7.5 AS Java
entry.content:
Hello,

1. Is it possible to do the full system restart (OS level) and then start the installation where it is getting stopped?

2. Attach the SAPINST log file

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content: Greetings, can you share as screenshot of IP10 transaction for your maintenance plan? According to what you have written the call object should be created when the measurement document was entered for 6 "times" and IP30 was ran afterwards.

entry.title: Re: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC...
entry.content: Hello, blending is available in ODE with QRC 3.2024 in graphs. A calculation using metrics from two models is possible then, too.

entry.title: Authority Check-For Cost Center Based on User name
entry.content:
Hi all, I hope all are doing well.

I'm new to  SAP ABAP.

We have requirement from our client, where a user should be restricted by the user name to a particular cost center.

For this I have created a Custom Table with fields MANDT, UNAME & KOSTL and i have assigned the cost centers based on User name.

EX:|UNAME ||KOSTL|

    USER1    CC1000

    USER1    CC2000

    USER2    CC2000

    USER3    CC3000

And also I have developed the code in standard functionality using Exits(Enhancements) EXIT_SAPLKBER_001.

But my code is restricting for all users even they are available in table also. 

Can anyone suggest me a proper approach to get a expected output.

Thanks in advance..... 

For Your Reference:

TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_z_cs_auth,
         mandt TYPE z_cs_auth-mandt,
         uname TYPE z_cs_auth-uname,
         kostl TYPE z_cs_auth-kostl,
       END OF z_ts_cs_auth.

* Internal Table
DATA: lt_user_cs TYPE TABLE OF z_ts_cs_auth.

* Work Area
DATA: ls_user_cs TYPE ts_z_cs_auth.

* Local Variables
DATA: lv_user_name       TYPE sy-uname,
      lv_cs              TYPE ts_z_cs_auth-kostl,
*      lv_message         TYPE string,
      lv_authority_check TYPE c LENGTH 1.

lv_user = sy-uname.
" Read the authorized cost centers for the user from the custom table
SELECT uname
       kostl
  INTO TABLE lt_user_cs
  FROM z_cs_auth
  WHERE uname = lv_user AND kostl = lv_cs.
IF lt_user_cs IS INITIAL.
  " No entries found for the user in the custom table
  MESSAGE e001(zuser_auth).
  EXIT.
ENDIF.

CALL FUNCTION 'AUTHORITY_CHECK'
  EXPORTING
*   NEW_BUFFERING       = 3
    user                = sy-uname
    object              = 'z_cs_auth'
    field1              = 'kostl'
    value1              = ls_user_cs-kostl
  EXCEPTIONS
    user_dont_exist     = 1
    user_is_authorized  = 2
    user_not_authorized = 3
    user_is_locked      = 4
    OTHERS              = 5.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
  MESSAGE e002(zuser_auth).
  EXIT.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Error in account determination: table T030K key 1000 BED Message no. FF709
entry.content: Please check FTXP Accounts option whether Tax accounts are maintained for all account key of that particular tax code.

entry.title: Re: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC...
entry.content:
Hello @Lothar_Köder

... with "graphs" you mean: Charts / Diagrams?

Where do you know this from?

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content:
Hi @johntebbitt,

I noticed you're discussing the Private Cloud Edition. In this context, there's no need to look at the deprecated information from the Public Cloud Edition (version ID 2402, which corresponds to a major upgrade in February 2024).

For S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, upgrades occur once a year. Therefore, the next release is slated for late 2024. As of now, the version currently available for new provisioning in the Private Edition remains 2023, meaning 19C is still in use.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Upskill with SAP Learnings - Get free Badges - Record of Achievement
entry.content: MM related?

entry.title: Mass change product configuration setting in manny sales orders
entry.content: Hello together, how can I mass change one configuration setting for the same material in manny purchase orders? Table RCTAV. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC...
entry.content: Hello Martin, yes, I mean charts with term graph. I tested it with our preview tenant which is already on version 2024.15.1.

entry.title: Automatic supplier Validity date based on the supplier audit management on S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello there!
How can S/4 Hana automate the validation of supplier validity dates based on supplier audit evaluation score?

I am looking for a descriptive solution with configurations. Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Hi Fancy, I understand what you are saying about private cloud edition releases. But I am working in Presales and the procurement lead times are very long. Therefore by the time we get to close the sale the new version will be available and I am asking what replaces 19C in the next release, what should we do instead?

entry.title: Transferring Measurement Document attachment to Notification
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAPiens:), 

I am currently working on the enhancement where the Plant Maintenance Notification is triggered when the Measurement Reading inside the Measurement Document (MD)is below the target reading in the Measurement Point (MP) by using User EXIT IMRC0001. This is supposed to happen when the MD is saved. This is all fine.

Another requirement is when the MD is saved the attachment inside the MD must also get transferred to the Notification 

How do I achieve this? Could anyone please provide me the details?

Regards

Deepak Doddagoudar

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher does not start after Refresh database
entry.content:
Thank you for your answer. The database and application server are on the same host and we checked with Hana Studio and all the database services are running.

We added the details of the host of the reproduction system that we backed up here, to etc/hosts file, and the following error was generated in dev_w0:

*** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=-10709 [dbhdbsql.cpp 620]

SQLCODE: -10709 S

QLERRTEXT : Connection failed (RTE:[89009] Socket connect timeout (60000 ms) (192.168.212.250:60650 -> sappcopy:\ 30515))

M ***LOG R19=> ThDbConnect, db_connect () [thxxtool.c 6114] M ThIErrHandle: in_ThErrHandle: 1

M *** ERROR => ThInit: db_connect (step TH_INIT, thRc ERROR-DB-CONNECT_ERROR, action STOP_WP, level 1) [thxxhead.c 2851]

Our test and production machines are not connect to each other and are not in the same network. Could this be the problem?

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hi @Ameen_Shariff 

You may find the recordings of the past live sessions on the learning site, eg. the CDC Essential one: 

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/sap-customer-data-cloud-essentials-1

Not all the live sessions are recorded though. 

We regularly publish/update quick learning videos on the Microlearning site,  some of them are being migrated to the learning site. 

https://microlearning.opensap.com/category/SAP+Customer+Data+Cloud/173267231

BTW while learning CDC, you can try out the ILT training hands-on exercises in our LSA systems: 

https://learning.sap.com/practice-systems/sap-customer-data-cloud-implementation-training

Good luck with your certification exam 🙂

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content:
Hi @johntebbitt ,

There seems to be some confusion regarding the status of 19C in the next release of Private Cloud Edition. Currently, there is no official message indicating that 19C will be deprecated in the forthcoming release. Therefore, "what might replace 19C" is not a question with answer at this moment.

It’s important to note that the features and updates you see in the Public Cloud Edition do NOT necessarily reflect what will happen in the Private Cloud Edition. Specifically, the scope item 19C, "Activity Management in Procurement," is unique to S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, and is not available in the Public Edition.

I hope this helps clarify your concerns.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Reset Repair flag into transport request / object was repaired in system / SE03
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content: @samuelyang, Thanks for these resources.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content: Please debug and check your Commit has triggered.

entry.title: Re: Substituir lista de condição de pagamentos SAP Busine...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, this is possible. In fact, according to your screenshot, you already have a formatted search in the field.

It would require a query, that takes your "Active" user defined field into account.

The only thing is, the user has to click on the formatted search icon, instead of the normal choices button.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: J2EE Instance does not start while while installing N...
entry.content:

INFO 2024-07-23 15:54:53.436 (root/sapinst)
Output of /usr/sap/S01/SCS02/exe/sapcontrol -prot NI_HTTP -nr 01 -function GetProcessList is written to the logfile sapcontrol_S01_J01.log.

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content: It appears that you must enter an Annual Estimate on the Measurement Point to allow for the usage of the Measurement Point on a Maintenance Plan. My concern with this is that the end users do not know AND from a bit of experience with Measurement Points used on Maintenance Plans, SAP will try to "predict" in the future when the Maintenance Plan is due. We do not want that, we simply want SAP to generate a Work Order from a Maintenance Plan when the equipment has been used exactly 6 times. These 6 times could come in any time frame (1 month, 6 months, 1 year, possibly never).

entry.title: How to increase report generation size limit in learning module in SAP
entry.content:
When trying to generate report in learning module, I am getting this error "

The report exceeds the maximum size limit of (20,971,520 bytes). Use additional filter criteria to reduce the report size and try again.

How to increase report generation size limit in learning module in HCM

entry.title: Re: Sales Contracts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_order qua...
entry.content:
Hi @thangarajthomas ,

In addition to @Andy_Wang's  answer, I kindly recommend submitting your requirement as an enhancement request on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales - All Requests | Customer Influence (sap.com). This will allow your request to be considered for future standard support.

As of now, this is a relatively new request for us, and there are no similar entries in the influence portal. Your submission would help us gauge wider interest and potentially prioritize this enhancement.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to 2405
entry.content: 1) Gentle Reminder
